app.name: Tip Tracker
app.tagline: See how tips are split, fairly.
home.hero.title: See how tips are split, fairly.
home.hero.sub: A simple way for small teams to log daily tips, split them transparently, and give every teammate a clean view of what they earned.
home.feature.transparent.title: Transparent
home.feature.transparent.body: Every employee sees the exact math. No hidden deductions.
home.feature.fast.title: Fast to log
home.feature.fast.body: Pre-select who worked based on the weekly schedule. Enter a total. Done.
home.feature.portable.title: Portable
home.feature.portable.body: Runs on a single server with a tiny SQLite file. Back it up with one click.
home.how.title: How it works
home.how.step3: Each day, log the total. The split is automatic.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter the admin password to continue
login.error.locked: Too many attempts. Try again later.
employees.title: Team Tips
employees.subtitle: Transparent view of this week's tip distribution
history.title: History
history.subtitle: Every recorded day
history.adminOnlyDetail: Sign in to see per-employee details.
admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Record today's tips
admin.overrideTooltip: Set this person's share manually. Remaining cash splits evenly across the others.
admin.onboard.title: Quick setup
employeesMgmt.title: Employees
employeesMgmt.subtitle: Add, rename, or remove team members
employeesMgmt.addNameHint: Letters, spaces, apostrophes, hyphens. Max 80 characters.
employeesMgmt.removeConfirm: Remove {name}? Past records keep them; they stop appearing in new ones.
schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.subtitle: Mark the days each person usually works
schedule.tip: Used by “Apply schedule” when recording tips.
schedule.empty: Add employees first to set their schedule.
editTips.title: Edit past days
editTips.subtitle: Adjust or remove previously recorded days
editTips.warning: Changes here are immediately visible to the whole team.
editTips.deleteConfirm: Delete this day's tips? You'll get a short window to undo.
error.404.title: Page not found
error.404.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
error.500.title: Something went wrong
error.500.body: An unexpected error occurred. The issue has been logged.
